content:
I'm thrilled to announce that my first research paper “From Stigma to Statute: The Legal Battle for Menstrual Rights and Equity” has been published in the IJLLR - Indian Journal of Law and Legal Research, Volume VIII, Issue III [ISSN: 2582-8878].
This paper explores how law can serve as a powerful tool to dismantle entrenched stigma and advance menstrual justice. Writing it was not just an academic exercise, but a deeply personal journey—one that challenged me to critically analyze existing legal frameworks, question societal taboos, and advocate for rights that are often overlooked.
The process of researching, drafting, and refining this work taught me the value of persistence and the importance of amplifying conversations around gender justice. I am grateful for the encouragement I’ve received along the way and excited to continue engaging with peers, mentors, and fellow researchers on issues that matter. 
Here's the link: https://lnkd.in/eg52M_yN
